quoteFirst: He began shuffling the cards with the intention of continuing the game, but Signor Giacomo looked at his watch, and found that it wanted only
quoteLast: , at which hour he was in the habit of winding his clock.
title: The Patriot (Piccolo Mondo Antico)
author: Fogazzaro, Antonio, 1842-1911; Agnetti, Mary Prichard, 1870-1948 [Translator]
